Description:

1. Eye ointment: used to symptoms such as conjunctival inflammation, corneal rupture, redness and swelling, eyelid inflammation and ectropion, and red bells in the eyes.

2. Suitable for animals such as dogs, cats, horses, cows, sheep, etc. It works quickly and can effectively protect eyes from serious injuries.

3. Widely used: Used to various extraocular infections, such as keratitis, lacrimal gland inflammation, dryness, itching, postoperative inflammation recovery, etc.

4. Usage: Eye opening ointment, open the pet's eyes, drop into the eyes and face, 2-3 times a day, and use once before bedtime.

5. Adverse reactions: Some may experience pain, persistent redness, or piercing squinting after use.

This mask will hydrate your skin and help your eye stay fresh and youtful, minimizing appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Benefits : 1. Reduce the dark under eye circles, disposable has seen results. 2. Reduces eye bags. 3. Moisturizes the skin around the eyes. 4. Anti-wrinkle, reduce fine wrinkles in the eyes. 5. Tighten the skin around the eyes. Description:

Developed with dermatologists, CeraVe Eye Repair Cream reduces the appearance of dark circles and puffiness. Specially formulated to protect the skin barrier with 3 essential ceramides. Hyaluronic Acid helps to retain the skin’s natural moisture.

PROTECT & BRIGHTEN: Reduces the look of dark circles and puffiness for brighter, healthier looking eyes

ESSENTIAL CERAMIDES: Contains 3 essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) to protect the skin’s natural barrier

MOISTURE RETAINING INGREDIENTS: Formulated with Hyaluronic Acid to help retain skin's natural moisture

GENTLE ON SKIN: Fragrance-free and non-comedogenic (won't clog pores)

How to use

Apply in small dots around the eye area and gently smooth until thoroughly absorbed. For best results, use daily with your favourite CeraVe cleanser and moisturiser.
